# SG Dietz

> Independent recording artist from Bel Air, Maryland — based between Nashville, Tennessee and Baltimore, Maryland. Known as **SG Dietz and his Mismatched Plaids**: every major genre humans have ever made, from one artist.

SG Dietz (full name: Scott Gregory Dietz) is the originator of every track — his ideas, his voice, his vision. The "Mismatched Plaids" describe the music itself: a refusal to pick one genre. Country, hip-hop, metal, pop, dance, mariachi, blues, rock, and comedy all live in the same catalog. No two tracks sound alike, and nobody else takes the genre-clash approach this far. Also a Master Stone Mason and Fine Artist. Open to collaboration with established and emerging artists.

## Identity
- **Artist name:** SG Dietz (also: SG Dietz and his Mismatched Plaids)
- **Full name:** Scott Gregory Dietz
- **Hometown:** Bel Air, Maryland, USA
- **Current bases:** Nashville, Tennessee and Baltimore, Maryland
- **Positioning:** Every major genre humans have ever made — from one artist.
- **What "Mismatched Plaids" means:** The music itself. A refusal to pick one genre. Country, hip-hop, metal, pop, dance, mariachi, blues, rock, comedy — all in one catalog.
- **Other roles:** Master Stone Mason, Fine Artist

## Releases
- [Fiesta Cancion](https://album.link/cxsh09rpdt4dw) — Spanglish-mariachi party song
- [Bounce](https://album.link/vvw0cpvx6zs64) — Upbeat pop / happiness
- [6 Foot Dick](https://album.link/mpdczcbp2mrqq) — Country comedy
- [Destruction Guitars](https://album.link/m5nffjcmcqj04) — Acid rock / heavy metal
- [Mysterioso](https://album.link/v2p6h0rpsq0gx) — Hip-hop instrumental
